title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: - Selection drop is likely happening in [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/app.js#L1081): if `activeTaskId` is not found after sync and tasks are non-empty, it is cleared (`activeTaskId = null`), so the sheet closes and looks like “cannot open.” Fix direction: keep selection through at least one post-login/detail sync window and show a “task remapped/not found” state before clearing. - ID shape mismatch risk is high in [happy-event-normalizers.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-event-normalizers.js#L353): events only read `task_id` (snake_case). If backend sends `taskId`/other shape, projector falls back to title-derived IDs, breaking reopen by URL/resume task ID. Fix direction: normalize ID aliases (`task_id`, `taskId`, nested task id) and preserve canonical ID mapping. - Detail API call uses current UI ID directly in [happy-app-state.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-state.js#L440) (`/task-detail?task_id=<activeTaskId>`), while optimistic/local IDs can originate from `client_task_id` or idempotency in [happy-app-state.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-app-state.js#L668). Fix direction: add local->remote task ID remap on first authoritative event/snapshot and use canonical ID for detail fetch + resume URL. - “In-progress but not openable” can also be a status contract drift: the in-progress tab only shows strict live statuses in [happy-event-protocol.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-event-protocol.js#L40) and [app.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/app.js#L837); unknown backend status strings are passed through as-is in [happy-event-normalizers.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-event-normalizers.js#L147). Fix direction: add status alias normalization (`in-progress` -> `running`, etc.) before filtering. - Test gap: current contracts validate happy-path task detail with matching IDs, but not reauth resume + ID remap failure mode (see [test-behavior-contract.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/apps/happy-web/tests/test-behavior-contract.js#L348)). Fix direction: add a regression test where resume `task` ID differs from backend canonical ID and assert sheet remains recoverably open/remapped.
